queries.name: Most Recent Active Job by PIDM
queries.description: Find employee's most recent Active, PRIMARY job record in NBRJOBS

queries.name: Job Supervisor by ORGN
queries.description: Find an ORGN code's supervisor in FTVORGN

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PIDM
columns.description: Internal identification number of the employee.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_POSN
columns.description: Position Number.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SUFF
columns.description: SUFFIX: Suffix of the job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.description: EFFECTIVE DATE: Date that the Job Assignment record becomes effective.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_STATUS
columns.description: STATUS: Status of the job. Valid values are A = Active, B = Leave without pay with benefits, L = Leave without pay without benefits, F = Leave with full pay and benefits, P = Leave with partial pay and benefits, T = Terminated.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_DESC
columns.description: DESCRIPTION: Description of the job. Defaults from the Position Title if left blank.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_ECLS_CODE
columns.description: EMPLOYEE CLASSIFICATION CODE: The employee class on this job. This can tell you whether someone is part time, full time, faculty, retired(90,92), etc.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PICT_CODE
columns.description: PAY ID CODE: The Pay ID attached to the job. Common values are MN (Monthly) and BW (Biweekly)

columns.name: NBRJOBS_COAS_CODE_TS
columns.description: TIME SHEET CHART OF ACCOUNTS CODE: I've only ever seen this be A.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_ORGN_CODE_TS
columns.description: TIME SHEET ORGANIZATION: Organization where time sheet is sent for this job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SAL_TABLE
columns.description: SALARY TABLE: The Salary Table attached to the job. Defaults from the Salary/Rate Rule Form (NTRSALA) via the Position Form (NBAPOSN).

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SAL_GRADE
columns.description: SALARY GRADE: The Salary Grade attached to the job. Defaults from the Salary/Rate Rule Form (NTRSALA) via the Position Form (NBAPOSN).

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SAL_STEP
columns.description: SALARY STEP: The Salary Step attached to the job. Defaults from the Salary/Rate Rule Form (NTRSALA) or can be entered online.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_APPT_PCT
columns.description: APPOINTMENT PERCENTAGE: The Appointment percent attached to the Job. Used to establish the percentage of full time appointment for an employee in a position. The value defaults from the position record, but the user may change at the job level. The appointment percent cannot exceed 100.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_FTE
columns.description: FULL TIME EQUIVALENCY: The full time percentage attached to the job. Defaults to 1.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_HRS_DAY
columns.description: HOURS PER DAY: The hours attached to the job that are normally worked in a day.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_HRS_PAY
columns.description: HOURS PER PAY: The hours attached to the job that are normally worked in a pay period.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SHIFT
columns.description: SHIFT: The shift attached to the job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_REG_RATE
columns.description: REGULAR RATE: The regular rate attached to the job. If this field is entered or defaulted from the Salary/Rate Rule Form, the Assign Salary is system calculated and vice versa.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_ASSGN_SALARY
columns.description: ASSIGNMENT SALARY: The salary to be paid each pay period. If the Assignment Salary is entered, the Annual Salary is calculated based on the factor and vice versa.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_FACTOR
columns.description: FACTOR: The number of pays per calendar year.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_ANN_SALARY
columns.description: ANNUAL SALARY: The annual salary attached to the job based on the calendar year. If the Annual Salary is entered, the Assignment Salary is system calculated based the factor and vice versa.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PER_PAY_SALARY
columns.description: PER PAY SALARY: Used for deferred pay calculations.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PAYS
columns.description: PAYS: Basically pay periods in a year. 12, 26, etc.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PER_PAY_DEFER_AMT
columns.description: PER PAY DEFERRED AMOUNT: The amount deferred each pay period for deferred pay calculation.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: Date of last activity (insert or update) on the record.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_JCRE_CODE
columns.description: CHANGE REASON CODE: Reason for the job change. A common one is TERM, termination/end of employment.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SGRP_CODE
columns.description: SALARY GROUP CODE: The Salary Group Code attached to the job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_EMPR_CODE
columns.description: EMPLOYER CODE: The Employer Identification code attached to the job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_LGCD_CODE
columns.description: LONGEVITY CODE: Longevity code attached to the job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_LOCN_CODE
columns.description: LOCATION CODE: EEO location attached to the job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SCHL_CODE
columns.description: SCHOOL CODE: EEO school attached to the job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SUPERVISOR_PIDM
columns.description: SUPERVISOR PIDM: ID of Supervisor. Almost always empty in our instance. See below queries for a way to pull Supervisor

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SUPERVISOR_POSN
columns.description: SUPERVISOR POSN: The position number of the supervisor attached to the job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SUPERVISOR_SUFF
columns.description: SUPERVISOR SUFFIX: Suffix attached to the supervisor's position.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_WKCP_CODE
columns.description: WORKER COMPENSATION CODE: Workers' Compensation Classification Code attached to the job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_JBLN_CODE
columns.description: JOB LOCATION CODE: Job Location Code attached to the job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PERS_CHG_DATE
columns.description: PERSONNEL CHANGE DATE: Date the change was actually made as opposed to the effective date which is for payroll purposes.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PCAT_CODE
columns.description: PREMIUM PAY CODE: Generates premium pay attached to the job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_DFPR_CODE
columns.description: DEFER PAY CODE: The defer pay schedule attached to the job. Defaults from PTRDFPR.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_ENCUMBRANCE_HRS
columns.description: ENCUMBRANCE HOURS: Hours used to calculate the encumbrance amount for this job in the active fiscal year.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_CONTRACT_NO
columns.description: JOB CONTRACT NUMBER: Job contract number attached to the job.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_STRS_ASSN_CODE
columns.description: STRS ASSIGNMENT CODE: STRS Assignment Code attached to the job. Valid values are STRS mandated.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_STRS_PAY_CODE
columns.description: STRS PAY CODE: STRS Pay Code for the employee attached to the job. The value selected determines how the employee's salary will be reported to STRS administration on the monthly F-496 report.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PERS_PAY_CODE
columns.description: PERS PAY CODE: PERS Pay Code for the employee attached to the job. The value selected determines how the employee's salary will be reported to PERS administration on the PERS Monthly Contribution Report.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_TIME_ENTRY_METHOD
columns.description: TIME ENTRY METHOD: Time Entry Method attached to the job. Valid values are P = Payroll, W = Web, D = Departmental, T = Third Party.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_TIME_ENTRY_TYPE
columns.description: TIME ENTRY TYPE: Time Entry Type attached to the job. It represents the structure of how time will be entered over the Web or on the Electronic Approvals of Time Entry Form (PHATIME). Valid values areT = Time Sheet, E = Exception Time Only, N = None.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_TIME_IN_OUT_IND
columns.description: TIME IN AND OUT INDICATOR: Time In/Out Indicator attached to the job. Valiod values are Y = Yes and N = No. If Y, this employee must enter time in and out information on the Web or have it entered by a department administrator on the Electronic Approvals of Time Entry Form (PHATIME). Time In and out must be entered for all earn codes that require hours entry. Time in and out will not be entered for earn codes that require units entry.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_LCAT_CODE
columns.description: LEAVE CATEGORY CODE: A code which identifies a group of leave types. It is used when the Leave by Job Method has been selected for leave processing.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_LEAV_REPT_METHOD
columns.description: LEAVE REPORT ENTRY METHOD: Leave Report Method Attached to the job. Valid values are P = None, W = Leave Report on the Web, D = Departmental Leave Report, T = Third Party Leave Report.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PICT_CODE_LEAV_REPT
columns.description: LEAVE REPORT PAY ID: The Leave Report Pay ID attached to the job and associated with a leave report or leave request.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The Oracle ID of the user who changed the record.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA ORIGIN: Source system that created or updated the row.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key

columns.name: NBRJOBS_VERSION
columns.description: VERSION: Optimistic lock token.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_GUID
columns.description: GUID: Global Unique Identifier to uniquely identify the record of a resource for integration.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SUPERVISOR_GUID
columns.description: SUPERVISOR GUID: Global Unique Identifier to uniquely identify the record of a resource for integration.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PERS_APPT_ID
columns.description: CALPERS APPOINTMENT ID: 10-digit CalPERS ID for this employee which indicates their association with this employer by CalPERS Member Category.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PERS_PAY_RATE_OVER
columns.description: CALPERS PAY RATE: Pay rate reported to CalPERS where the derived pay rate must be changed for proper reporting.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PERS_PAY_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: CALPERS PAY RATE TYPE: CalPERS Pay Rate Type identifies hourly, daily or monthly pay. HRY-Hourly, DLY-Daily, MTY-Monthly.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PERS_SCHED_DAYS
columns.description: CALPERS SCHEDULED DAYS: Number of days per week considered full time if the Pay Rate Type is Daily.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PERS_SCHED_HRS_WEEK
columns.description: CALPERS SCHEDULED HOURS PER WEEK: Number of hours per week considered full time if the Pay Rate Type is not Daily.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_PERS_SPECIAL_ONLY_IND
columns.description: PERS SPECIAL COMPENSATION ONLY: Indicates this job only includes special compensation earnings and no regular earnings. Special compensation will be reported under the matching/primary PERS XML payroll record.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SCLS_BASE_HRS
columns.description: CLASSIFICATION BASE HOURS: Minimum base hours associated to a classification code.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_SCLS_CODE
columns.description: CALSTRS CLASSIFICATION CODE: Code identifies classification used in CalSTRS monthly and supplemental reports of retirement contributions.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_STIN_CODE
columns.description: CALSTRS AB1586 CODE: Code indicates whether an employee has been marked in CalSTRS system as eligible for recalculation of benefits.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_CSST_CODE
columns.description: CALSTRS SERVICE TYPE CODE: California State Teachers Retirement System Service Type Code. Required for CalSTRS Defined Benefit Reporting for both members (DB1) and non-members (DB2).

columns.name: NBRJOBS_CSTB_CODE
columns.description: CALSTRS TIME BASE CODE: California State Teachers Retirement System Time Base Code. Basis of employment associated with the contribution line.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_CSPP_CODE
columns.description: CALSTRS EXPECTED PAY PERIODS CODE: Four digit California State Teachers Retirement System Expected Pay Periods Code used in Defined Benefit Reporting for Defined Benefit Members (DB1) or Defined Benefit Non-members (DB2).

columns.name: NBRJOBS_STRS_FT_BASE_HRS
columns.description: CALSTRS FULL TIME BASE HOURS: The number of hours required in a school term for full-time. Required for reporting California State Teachers Retirement System Defined Benefit Non-member (DB2) employees performing creditable service.

columns.name: NBRJOBS_STRS_HRS_DAY
columns.description: CALSTRS WORK HOURS PER DAY: The number of hours required per day in a complete workday for full-time.
